---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new cmdlet or enhancement
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Description
What feature are you requesting?

## Windows equivalent
What Windows cmdlet or parameter does this correspond to?
(e.g. `Get-Service -DependentServices`, `New-Service -BinaryPathName`)

## Linux implementation
How should this work on Linux? (e.g. D-Bus call, systemctl flag, file I/O)

## Priority
- [ ] MUST — parity with Windows cmdlet
- [ ] SHOULD — useful enhancement
- [ ] NICE-TO-HAVE — convenience feature

## Additional context
Any relevant details, links, or examples.
